# FreQtik
> Official studio homepage: https://freqtik.com/
> Independent audio software, producer frameworks, games and interactive experiments. FreQtik is a producer-led, AI-assisted independent studio; AI is used as development leverage, while public releases remain human-directed, tested and documented.

## Core audio product
- [Impulse Anvil](https://freqtik.com/impulse-anvil.html): Windows VST3 creative impulse-response designer. Prepare A/B sources, apply Color and Texture processing, use time, spectral and spatial morph approaches, create A-to-B Lerp movement inside an IR, and export reusable WAV impulse responses.
- [Impulse Anvil documentation](https://freqtik.com/docs.html): Workflow, seven morph approaches, editing, preview, baking and export.
- [Downloads](https://freqtik.com/downloads.html): Current Impulse Anvil demo and release guidance.
- [Official Impulse Anvil releases](https://github.com/FreQtik/freqtikWebsite.github.io/releases): Versioned public builds and patch notes.

## Other audio work
- [Master Desktop Tap](https://freqtik.com/master-desktop-tap.html): Free Windows VST3 beta for routing DAW master audio from ASIO workflows into connected Windows output devices for Discord, OBS and screen sharing.
- [Contrast Rules for Producers](https://freqtik.com/contrast-rules-for-producers.html): Free producer framework about context, contrast, attention and timing in arrangement, sound design and mixing decisions.

## Games and interactive projects
- [Learning to Bear](https://freqtik.com/learning-to-bear.html): Surreal 3D puzzle-platformer with 40+ handcrafted levels, movement abilities and dreamlike challenges.
- [Aim Trainer Bee Pro](https://freqtik.com/aim-trainer-bee-pro.html): One-minute precision clicker with performance statistics and Steam leaderboards.
- [Micro Mouse Star Trainer](https://freqtik.com/micro-mouse-trainer.html): Free browser precision trainer for mouse micro-control.
- [Boon TD Online](https://boontd.freqtik.com): Browser-playable tower-defense project.

## Studio and contact
- [About FreQtik](https://freqtik.com/about.html): Studio approach, development method and selected work.
- [Connect](https://freqtik.com/connect.html): Support, Discord, YouTube and Instagram.
- [FreQtik on YouTube](https://freqtik.com/youtube.html): Product guidance, music and development videos.

Legal pages containing required personal information are intentionally excluded from this machine-readable index.
